# Parable Labs
> AI-native firm. Founded by Monifa Porter.

## About
Parable Labs helps organizations see beyond the efficiency trap and into what AI actually makes possible — then builds it with them. AI is a judgment play, not a technology play. Cognitive sovereignty: AI amplifies human judgment without replacing it. Named for Octavia Butler's Parable series. The only constant is change.

## Founder
Monifa Porter. CEO. 20 years product leadership in Silicon Valley (PayPal, Opower, AAA). 7 years building ventures inside Global 1000 companies at Mach49. 3 years building AI-native. Stanford GSB. Guest lecturer on Product Management.

## Team
John Davidson. Operations & Delivery. 15+ years product leadership (Opower, Capital One, Granular/Corteva, Mach49). Tuck MBA. AI-first product builder.

## Services
- AI transformation engagements using The Clearing methodology (Scout the Terrain, Clear the Field, Plant the Superpowers, Tend and Grow)
- AI Mastery Course — The Art of the Possible (senior leaders, cohort-based, hands-on)
- Speaking and workshops on cognitive sovereignty and AI transformation

## Key Concepts
- Cognitive sovereignty: maintaining authorship over decisions as AI accelerates
- Work-shaped work: the organizational overhead that AI eliminates entirely
- The efficiency trap: optimizing existing work instead of reimagining what's possible
- The growth case: using AI to build new products, services, and markets with existing talent
